case_title: QUENCH USA, INC. A CORPORATION VS. UNI-STONE & CABINET, INC. A CORPORATION FORMELY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUENCH USA, INC. A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNI-STONE & CABINET, INC. A CORPORATION FORMELY KNOWN AS UNI MARBLE & GRANITE INC $5,929.33 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $320.76 INTEREST, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,744.59, SEE SCANNED DOC
CRC 3.740 REVIEW, OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUENCH USA, INC. A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT UNI-STONE & CABINET, INC. A CORPORATION FORMELY KNOWN AS UNI MARBLE & GRANITE INC DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2020
